loc_lesdownia.name: Lesdownia
loc_lesdownia.description: A land of fractured allegiances and ancient farming traditions. Known primarily for the Tripartate Valley, it is a region where the simple life of a farmer is often interrupted by the politics of Great Houses.

loc_tripartate_valley.name: Tripartate Valley
loc_tripartate_valley.description: The fertile heart of Lesdownia. Most of the region's Elirium crops are harvested here, under the watchful eye of House Kirko.

loc_lefkada_maw.name: Lefkada - The Maw
loc_lefkada_maw.description: A layer of Hell where the geography is as shifting and cruel as the devils that inhabit it. The air is thick with the scent of brimstone and iron.
